title: Luminary
description: A mood-adaptive music player that generates ambient soundscapes based on your emotional state using ML inference.
longDescription: Built to explore the intersection of machine learning and emotional UX. The model runs client-side via TensorFlow.js, analyzing facial micro-expressions through the webcam to infer mood states and generate real-time audio.

title: Cartograph
description: An interactive data visualization platform that transforms raw datasets into cinematic 3D maps.
longDescription: Powered by Three.js and D3.js, Cartograph turns complex CSVs into explorable 3D terrain maps with smooth camera-fly transitions and narrative overlays.

title: Vestige
description: A digital memory archive — capture fleeting moments as interactive 3D objects that persist in a shared virtual space.
longDescription: Vestige lets users upload photos which are transformed into 3D sculptures using depth estimation. Multiple users inhabit the same virtual gallery, seeing each other's memories in real-time via WebRTC.

title: Pulse
description: A real-time collaborative design feedback tool that embeds directly into Figma as a plugin.
longDescription: Pulse solves async design review by bringing live voice + annotation directly into Figma. Built at a 48-hour hackathon and shipped to 200+ users in the first week.

title: Chronicle
description: An AI-powered journal that turns scattered thoughts into organized personal knowledge graphs.
longDescription: Chronicle ingests free-form voice or text journals and uses an LLM to extract entities, emotions, and themes — then visualizes them as an interactive knowledge graph that grows over time.
